entities.name: V
entities.context: Owner of the knowledge system who receives warm intro support for networking and meetings

entities.name: Warm Intro
entities.context: Two-component introduction system with wrapper email and forwardable blurb

entities.name: Thrust Framework
entities.context: Framework for identifying primary intent of introductions (Sales/Partnership, etc.)

entities.name: Connector
entities.context: Person who facilitates introduction between V and target person

entities.name: Internal Meeting
entities.context: Meetings between team members - warm intros not applicable

entities.name: External Meeting
entities.context: Meetings with outside contacts - triggers warm intro generation

entities.name: Context for Connector
entities.context: First component of warm intro - wrapper email explaining what V wants from connection

entities.name: Forwardable Blurb
entities.context: Second component of warm intro - ultra-short 3-4 line essence for connector to forward

entities.name: Sales/Partnership
entities.context: One type of thrust/intent for warm introductions

relationships.context: V uses warm intros for external meeting networking
Framework determines primary intent and optimization of each intro
First structural component of every warm intro
Second structural component of every warm intro
Email content written for the connector explaining V's needs
Internal meetings skip warm intro generation
External meetings trigger warm intro generation
One category within the thrust framework
